## Type of change

- [ ] Editorial / documentation (no normative change)
- [ ] Erratum (corrects an error without changing intended behavior)
- [ ] Normative change (requires a SEP — see docs/sep-guidelines.md)
- [ ] Tooling, schema, or examples

## Checklist

- [ ] I have signed the CLA (the bot will verify).
- [ ] Normative changes are accompanied by, or reference, a SEP.
- [ ] Examples and the JSON Schema remain consistent with the specification text.
- [ ] No unrelated changes are bundled into this PR.
